svg.text: We create progressive drawing for a line element Script //We need length of line : MyLine = evt.target.ownerDocument.getElementById("MyLine") x1 = MyLine.getAttributeNS(null,"x1") y1 = MyLine.getAttributeNS(null,"y1") x2 = MyLine.getAttributeNS(null,"x2") y2 = MyLine.getAttributeNS(null,"y2") MyLine_length = Math.sqrt((x2 - x1) * (x2 - x1) + (y2 - y1) * (y2 - y1)) MyLine.style.setProperty("stroke-dasharray",MyLine_length + " " +MyLine_length) MyLine.style.setProperty("stroke-dashoffset",MyLine_length) MyAnim = evt.target.ownerDocument.getElementById("MyAnim") MyAnim.setAttributeNS(null,"from",MyLine_length) MyLine.style.setProperty("visibility","visible") MyAnim.beginElement() SVG objects <line id="MyLine" x1="50" y1="400" x2="700" y2="350" style="stroke-width:3;stroke:green;visibility:hidden"> <animate id="MyAnim" attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" from="0" to="0" dur="5" begin="indefinite"/> </line>
